text:
There once was a little girl named Alice who loved adventures more than anything.

One day, a magical creature named Percival was rumored to live nearby. Despite dozens of attempts over years, Alice had never actually seen him. She dreamed of adventures like adventureships crossing starways.

One evening, as the stars twinkled brightly like diamonds, Alice heard an unusual sound coming from the forest nearby.

What sounded like a flute!

Listening intently, Alice saw a tiny fairy dancing so gracefully.

Could it be Percival?

With hope swelling in her chest, Alice took off at a run.

That night, Alice was rewarded.

As Alice listened to the sweet melody, Percival spun an intricate dance around. He flounced about, filling every little bird's cage with delicious treats.

Every bird chirped happily.

Every small animal giggled.

And Alice?

She danced happily too.

With one flip--

*PFFFFFT*

A sparkle!

*Sparkle sparkle*

Percival had caught a spiderweb
